findings.title: Unsafe pickle deserialization
findings.description: Found `\bpickle\.loads?\s*\(` at tests/test_model_scanner.py:79. Deserializing untrusted model files can execute arbitrary code.
findings.recommendation: Avoid pickle for model loading; use safetensors or ONNX instead.

findings.title: Unsafe dill deserialization

findings.title: Unsafe cloudpickle deserialization
findings.description: Found `\bcloudpickle\.loads?\s*\(` at tests/test_model_scanner.py:98. Deserializing untrusted model files can execute arbitrary code.

findings.title: Unsafe torch.load call
findings.description: Found `\btorch\.load\s*\(` at tests/test_model_scanner.py:103. Deserializing untrusted model files can execute arbitrary code.
findings.recommendation: Pass weights_only=True to torch.load to prevent arbitrary code execution.

findings.title: Potentially unsafe joblib.load
findings.description: Found `\bjoblib\.load\s*\(` at tests/test_model_scanner.py:109. Deserializing untrusted model files can execute arbitrary code.
findings.recommendation: joblib uses pickle internally; verify the file source is trusted.

findings.title: numpy.load with allow_pickle=True
findings.description: Found `\bnp\.load\s*\(.*allow_pickle\s*=\s*True` at tests/test_model_scanner.py:114. Deserializing untrusted model files can execute arbitrary code.
findings.recommendation: Remove allow_pickle=True or ensure the .npy file comes from a trusted source.

findings.title: Hardcoded AWS access key ID
findings.description: Potential AWS access key ID detected at tests/test_config_analyzer.py:89. Excerpt: '_write(tmp_path, "deploy.sh", "AWS_KEY=AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE\\n")'. Hardcoded credentials are a critical security risk.
findings.recommendation: Remove the credential from source code. Store secrets in environment variables and load them with python-dotenv or a secrets manager.

findings.title: Hardcoded Slack webhook URL
findings.description: Potential Slack webhook URL detected at tests/test_config_analyzer.py:101. Excerpt: 'url = "https://hooks.slack.com/services/T00000000/B00000000/XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX'. Hardcoded credentials are a critical security risk.
findings.recommendation: Remove the credential from source code. Store secrets in environment variables and load them with python-dotenv or a secrets manager.

findings.title: Hardcoded PostgreSQL connection string with credentials
findings.description: Potential PostgreSQL connection string with credentials detected at tests/test_config_analyzer.py:108. Excerpt: '_write(tmp_path, "settings.py", \'DB = "postgres://admin:s3cr3t@db.example.com/my'. Hardcoded credentials are a critical security risk.
findings.recommendation: Remove the credential from source code. Store secrets in environment variables and load them with python-dotenv or a secrets manager.

findings.title: Hardcoded MySQL connection string with credentials
findings.description: Potential MySQL connection string with credentials detected at tests/test_config_analyzer.py:114. Excerpt: '_write(tmp_path, "settings.py", \'DB = "mysql://root:password@localhost/app"\\n\')'. Hardcoded credentials are a critical security risk.
findings.recommendation: Remove the credential from source code. Store secrets in environment variables and load them with python-dotenv or a secrets manager.

findings.title: DEBUG mode enabled
findings.description: Found `return [_finding("DEBUG=True", Severity.MEDIUM, "config_analyzer")]` at tests/test_risk_engine.py:58.
findings.recommendation: Set DEBUG=False in production. Use environment variables to toggle debug mode.

findings.title: DEBUG mode enabled
findings.description: Found `assert "DEBUG=True" in titles` at tests/test_risk_engine.py:173.
findings.recommendation: Set DEBUG=False in production. Use environment variables to toggle debug mode.

findings.title: DEBUG mode enabled
findings.description: Found `- scan_for_misconfigs: detects DEBUG=True, app.debug=True, permissive CORS,` at tests/test_config_analyzer.py:7.
findings.recommendation: Set DEBUG=False in production. Use environment variables to toggle debug mode.

findings.title: Flask debug mode enabled
findings.description: Found `- scan_for_misconfigs: detects DEBUG=True, app.debug=True, permissive CORS,` at tests/test_config_analyzer.py:7.
findings.recommendation: Never enable app.debug=True in production; it exposes an interactive debugger.

findings.title: DEBUG mode enabled
findings.description: Found `_write(tmp_path, "settings.py", "DEBUG = True\n")` at tests/test_config_analyzer.py:176.
findings.recommendation: Set DEBUG=False in production. Use environment variables to toggle debug mode.

findings.title: Flask debug mode enabled
findings.description: Found `_write(tmp_path, "app.py", "app.debug = True\n")` at tests/test_config_analyzer.py:182.
findings.recommendation: Never enable app.debug=True in production; it exposes an interactive debugger.

findings.recommendation: Restrict CORS origins to known domains instead of using a wildcard.
